case_title: ZARINA RAZZAK et al VS. NAZREEN RAZZAK ALI et al

docket_entries.description: FRAUD, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF RAZZAK, ZARINA RAZZAK, YASMIN MORRIS, SHAINAZ RAZZAK, SAMUEL RAZZAK, ABDUL HAKIM RAZZAK, ABDUL HAROON AS TO DEFENDANT ALI, NAZREEN RAZZAK AS TRUSTEE OF THE ABDUL AND JAEBUN RAZZAK TRUST DATED MAY 5, 2001 AND AMENDMENTS THERETO RAZZAK, NAZREEN ALI DOES 1 THRU 50 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR OCT-03-2008 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  JUN-30-2008 CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT DUE ON         SEP-18-2008
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE OF OCT-03-2008 CONTINUED TO NOV-14-2008 AT 9:00 AM IN DEPT. 212, FOR THE SUBMISSION OF CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENTS. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF RAZZAK, ZARINA ESTIMATED TIME FOR TRIAL: 5.0 DAYS
REMOVED FROM COURT TRIAL CALENDAR ON MAY-28-2009 IN DEPT. 501. JUDGMENT IN FAVOR OF DEFENDANT AND AGAINTS PLAINTIFFS. JUDGE R. QUIDACHAY, CLERK R. PASCUAL, REPORTER R. BALIAN # 5220.
1ST AMENDED CROSS COMPLAINT FILED BY CROSS COMPLAINANT ALI, NAZREEN RAZZAK INDIVIDUALLY AND AS TRUSTEE OF ABUL AND JAEBUN RAZZAK TRUST AS TO CROSS DEFENDANT RAZZAK, ABDUL HAKIM ROES 1- 20, INCLUSIVE
SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE HELD ON APR-30-2009 IN DEPT. 503, CASE NOT SETTLED. THE TRIAL DATE OF MAY-18-2009 IN DEPT. 206 IS CONFIRMED. JUDGE:ROBERT DONDERO, CLERK:M. SMITH, NOT REPORTED

STATEMENT OF DECISION AFTER FULL CONSIDERATION OF ALL PAPERS AND ARGUMENTS SUBMITTED BY COUNSEL; 1.) THE COURT FINDS IN FAVOR OF DEFENDANT AS TO CLAIM OF LACK OF TESTAMENTARY CAPACITY; 2.)THE COURT FINDS IN FAVOR OF THE DEFENDANT AS TO THE CLAIM OF UNDUE INFLUENCE; 3.) THE COURT FINDS PLAINTIFFS FAILED TO SUSTAIN THE BUDEN OF PROOF AS TO THE OTHER CAUSES OF ACTION-TO IMPOSE A CONSTRUCTIVE TRUST, FOR AN ACCOUNTING, FOR FINANCIAL ELDER ABUSE AND FAUD AND 4.) JUDGMENT AS TO CROSS-COMPLAINT IS MOOT. THEREFORE, JUDGMENT IS IN FAVOR OF DEFENDANT AND AGAINST PLAINTIFFS. DEFENDANT SHALL PREPARE AN ORDER AND JUDGMENT IN CONFIRMITY WITH THE ABOVE.
NOTICE OF PENDENCY OF ACTION FILED BY PLTF'S ATTORNEY.
COPYING FEES PAID BY PLAINTIFF RAZZAK, ZARINA RAZZAK, YASMIN MORRIS, SHAINAZ RAZZAK, SAMUEL RAZZAK, ABDUL HAKIM RAZZAK, ABDUL HAROON
AMENDED ANSWER TO COMPLAINT FILED BY DEFENDANT ALI, NAZREEN RAZZAK INDIVIDUALLY AND AS TRUSTEE OF ABUL AND JAEBUN RAZZAK TRUST

NOTICE OF MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE ON APR-30-2009 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPARTMENT 210. NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE OF TRIAL, COURT TRIAL SET FOR MAY-18-2009 AT 9:30 AM IN DEPT. 206. CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE ON NOV-14-2008 IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
COURT TRIAL ON MAY-28-2009 TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION ON MAY 28, 2009. JUDGE R. PASCUAL, CLERK R. PASCUAL, REPORTER R. BALIAN 5220

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RAZZAK, ZARINA RAZZAK, YASMIN MORRIS, SHAINAZ RAZZAK, SAMUEL RAZZAK, ABDUL HAKIM RAZZAK, ABDUL HAROON TAKE NOTHING FROM DEFENDANT RAZZAK, NAZREEN ALI ALI, NAZREEN RAZZAK INDIVIDUALLY AND AS TRUSTEE OF ABUL AND JAEBUN RAZZAK TRUST JUDGEMENT IS RENDER IN FAVOR OF DEFENDANT AND AGAINST PLAINTIFFS.
